UG-32  FORMED HEADS, PRESSURE ON CONCAVE SIDE. (a) The required thickness of ellipsoidal, torispherical, and hemispherical heads under pressure on the concave side shall be computed using the formulas in this paragraph. The maximum allowable stress shall be as specified in UG-23. (b) The joint efficiency factor E from UW-12 shall be applied to the head-to-shell joint. Heads attached by welding shall comply with the requirements of UW-13. (c) The minimum thickness shall not be less than that required by UG-27 for the equivalent shell, plus corrosion allowance per UG-25. For heads under pressure on the convex side, see UG-33. Postweld heat treatment shall be performed as required by UCS-79 when applicable.
